summary: Plan-only remediation classification for five open PRs. No GitHub mutations are planned directly. No hydrated item is security-sensitive. No merge recommendation is safe because none has a complete merge preflight with resolved review state and passed Codex /review. One contributor PR has a bounded repair path; the broad channel-turn PR needs maintainer judgment.

actions.reason: Keep in the cron remediation family, but do not merge from this plan-only shard.
Author-owned draft work should stay on its own track.
Repair the contributor branch before any merge consideration; preserve contributor credit.
Provide an executable repair plan for the affected contributor PR.
Broad code delta and active author follow-up are explicit human-review triggers.
Keep as related trajectory hardening work; do not merge or replace from this shard.

needs_human: #90248 requires maintainer scope judgment because it is an XL dirty-candidate PR with broad cross-surface code delta and active author follow-up.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor PR #90204 in-place so the Windows compatibility fixes can be evaluated with clean proof and addressed review-bot feedback.
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Repair plan for #90204:

- Address Copilot review findings in path normalization, symlink-dependent tests, and channel ordering behavior.
- Keep the repair on the contributor branch when possible because maintainer_can_modify is true.
- Preserve @aniruddhaadak80 credit as the source PR author.
- Re-run targeted Windows compatibility and changed-file checks before any merge recommendation.

Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/90204
credit_notes: Credit original contributor @aniruddhaadak80 for the Windows compatibility fix shape and source PR.
